signals.headline: Putin's Emergency Speech Warns West Against Iran Intervention | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Putin's Emergency Speech Warns West Against Iran Intervention | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Russian President Vladimir Putin delivered a live emergency speech from the Kremlin on April 16, 2026, issuing a stark warning against Western military intervention in Iran, escalating geopolitical tensions and challenging U.S. policy under President Trump[1].  
No formal declarations of war, military alliance
